title: potentilla fragariastrum var. micrantha
intro: Potentilla fragariastrum var. micrantha, also known as dwarf potentilla, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family, Rosaceae, characterized by its small white flowers and shrub-like growth habit. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of dwarf potentilla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
